transcript: And there's nothing more important than what we talk about. It's your money, it's your life! Let's go to Orlando, Florida. WDBO. Desmond, welcome to the show.
Uhhm.. phoning you tonight, regarding what I feel.. is the surefire--
You have a sure fire? What?
A surefire investment idea for '95. Now, is this--
A sure fire? No, wait a minute. Sure fire?

And... is this something that's going to incite the proverbial "riot in the streets"? I don't think so. Is this something that's gonna make a whole lot of money? Yes it is. [downward pitch shift] It involves the, uh, sale of mangoes, uh, from the Caribbean Islands, I'll be frank with you... [muddled speech]
[unclear] His... phone is sinking into the...
[laughs] You know, uh, he has one of those, uh, one of those spy phones, one of those gadget phones--
--and, uh... Desmond is a crackpot. With a cool little, uh, knobby on his phone. [indiscernible]
